children.name: p
children.textContent: " Your headaches spike when sleep is under 6 hours and pollen is high. "

children.name: p
children.textContent: " Attacks are 2.8× more likely on days when barometric pressure drops by more than 3 hPa. "

children.name: p
children.textContent: " Taking Sumatriptan within 30 min of onset reduces episode duration by ~65%. "
